title: codereview: Add I2C pinctrl group for keyboard in t_deck-pinctrl.dtsi to match clarification
description: P2: The DTS comment now clarifies I2C pins but pinctrl.dtsi lacks i2c0_default for SDA18/SCL8. This could lead to wrong DTS later. codereview tagged. Linked to hzvh.
close_reason: Fixed keyboard enablement in defconfig, pinctrl, binding, driver best practices after 3 codereview passes
